summary: Tested clickable invoice/PO numbers feature across AgriBooks app. Feature is properly implemented in all specified pages. Core functionality verified working - invoice numbers open InvoiceDetailModal, PO numbers navigate to /purchase-orders.
critical_code_review_comments: Code implementation verified in all pages: DailyLogPage (6 invoice click handlers), DashboardPage (7 handlers including 2 PO navigation), AccountingPage (3 handlers), ExpensesPage (2 handlers), ReportsPage (4 handlers in 2 sub-components), AuditCenterPage (4 handlers)
InvoiceDetailModal properly integrated with state management (invoiceModalOpen, selectedInvoiceNumber) in all pages
context_for_next_testing_agent: Clickable invoice feature fully implemented. All pages have InvoiceDetailModal integration. Pages tested successfully: SalesPage, AccountingPage (Receivables), ReportsPage (AR Aging, Sales), DashboardPage (PO navigation). Skipped tests due to lack of test data: AuditCenterPage (no audited invoices), DailyLogPage (no walk-in SI-/INV- invoices on test date), ExpensesPage (no linked invoices in expenses). Feature works - just needs appropriate data to appear.

SalesPage_clickable_invoices.details: Invoice SI-20260301-0187 clicked successfully, modal opened showing invoice details (customer, items, totals)

AccountingPage_receivables_invoices.details: 56 invoice buttons found, clicking opens InvoiceDetailModal

ReportsPage_ar_aging_invoices.details: Expanded AR aging row, 4 invoice buttons found, click opens modal

ReportsPage_sales_invoices.details: 4 invoice buttons in sales transactions, click opens modal

DashboardPage_po_navigation.details: 5 PO buttons found, clicking navigates to /purchase-orders page

DailyLogPage_invoices.details: 6 click handlers implemented in code (credit sales, walk-in log, close accounts preview). No SI-/INV- invoice data on test date 2026-03-01

ExpensesPage_linked_invoices.details: 2 click handlers implemented for linked_invoice_number display. No expenses with linked invoices in current data

AuditCenterPage_invoices.details: 4 click handlers implemented (edited invoices, off-hours, digital transactions). No audited invoices in current data

code_implementation_verification.DailyLogPage.js: InvoiceDetailModal imported (line 22), state hooks (lines 219-220), 6 onClick handlers with setInvoiceModalOpen, modal rendered (lines 1462-1465)
code_implementation_verification.DashboardPage.js: InvoiceDetailModal imported (line 20), state hooks (lines 186-187), 4 invoice handlers, 2 PO navigation handlers to /purchase-orders, modal rendered (lines 605-608)
code_implementation_verification.AccountingPage.js: InvoiceDetailModal imported (line 20), state hooks (lines 49-50), 3 handlers (receivables + expenses linked), modal rendered (lines 1142-1145)
code_implementation_verification.ExpensesPage.js: InvoiceDetailModal imported (line 19), state hooks (lines 46-47), 2 handlers for linked_invoice_number, modal rendered (lines 800-803)
code_implementation_verification.ReportsPage.js: InvoiceDetailModal imported (line 17), 2 sub-components (ArAgingReport, SalesReport) each with own state and modal
code_implementation_verification.AuditCenterPage.js: InvoiceDetailModal imported (line 21), state hooks (lines 487-488), 4 handlers, modal rendered (lines 1624-1627)
